title: OtakoMod
description: Jujutsu Kaisen, Dandadan, Solo Leveling, Chainsaw Man, SpyxFamily, Nanatsu no Taizai,Shuumatsu no Walkyrie,  and many others.
body: Leave your suggestion, this is very important. If you want a anime in the mod just let me know. And if you make a video of the mod, send it to me and I'll post it here.    Are you bored playing solo in minecraft? Too few mobs in the world? Or do you still love anime? Well, this mod is for you! Jujutsu Kaisen, Solo Leveling, Black Clover, Nanatsu no Taizai, Death Note,Shuumatsu no Walkyrie and many others). They can be found all over the world, some of them have unique weapons that are left after their death. It is now possible to find a group of new residents in the world.   Features : 280+ Characters 4 Biomes New Weapons New Armors \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Animes in mod** : \-Aho Girl \-Akiba's Trip Animation \-Ao no Exorcist \-Asu no Yoichi \-Banana Fish \-Black Clover \-Blend S \-Bloom into You \-Boku to Roboco \-Busou Shoujo Machiavellianism \-Chainsaw Man \-Charlotte \-Code:Breaker \-Dandadan \-Death Note \-Fate \-Fuuka \-Gokushufudou \-Great Teacher Onizuka \-Hajimete no Gal \-Houseki no Kuni \-Ijiranaide, Nagatoro-san \-Inazuma Eleven \-Isekai wa no smartphone \-Ishuzoku Reviewers \-Jujutsu Kaisen \-Kaijuu 8-Gou \-Karakai jouzo no takagi-san \-Kino no Tabi \-Kimi no Nawa \-Kiss x Sis \-Konosuba \-Koukousei Kazoku \-Masamune-kun no revenge \-Munou na Nana \-My Dress-Up Darling \-Nanatsu no Taizai \-No game no life \-Nozoki Ana \-Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint \-Prison School \-Re: Monster \-Renai Boukun \-Rokudenashi Majutsu Koushi to Akashic Records \-Saihate no Paladin \-Sakamoto Days \-Sakamoto Desu Ga? \-Shuumatsu no Valkyrie \-Solo Leveling \-Sora Yori mo Tooi Basho \-Spy x Family \-Tales of demons and gods \-Tobaku Mokushiroku Kaiji \-Vinland Saga \-Yotsuba To! \-Zero kara Hajimeru Mahou no Sho   \-------------------------------------------------------     If have you do a review of this mod please tell me, I will love see it and put here. REVIEWS :
